name: Broccoli Garden Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the yams, covered, in two cups chicken broth for 10 minutes or until soft. Puree in a food mill or processor. Set aside.
2. In a large pot with cover, sauté the onions and garlic in oil until the onions are translucent and starting to brown.
3. Add celery and sauté for a few minutes.
4. Add broccoli and remaining chicken broth. Simmer, covered, for 8 minutes or until tender-crisp.
5. Stir in puree; add seasonings.
6. Serve immediately or serve chilled. Top each portion with 1/4 cup chopped watercress.
7. Makes 11 one-cup servings.
Nutrient content per serving: 225 calories, 2 grams fat, 4 grams protein, 50 grams carbohydrate, .6 milligrams cholesterol, 509 milligrams sodium, .4 milligrams beta carotene.
